name: Turkey Tonnato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. For the dressing: Puree tuna with garlic, anchovies (if using), mayonnaise, and sour cream or yogurt. Season with pepper.
2. For the salad: Combine diced turkey with cooked potatoes in a bowl. Mix in half of the dressing. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
3. Arrange arugula or watercress on a large plate. Place the potato and turkey mixture in the center.
4. Arrange slices of turkey on top of the salad.
5. Drizzle remaining dressing over the salad.
6. Scatter cherry tomatoes, black olives around the outside of the salad and sprinkle with parsley.
SERVES: 6-8
